docs.text: begin ¶ prologue-0 ¶ prologue-1 ¶ prologue-2 ¶ prologue-3 ¶ any #chapter #prologue ¶
docs.title: Prologue

docs.text: double transition climbjump and dash left any #1a #1a-11 ¶
docs.title: 1a 11

docs.text: buffer the wallbounce on the updash, it needs to be 1st frame demohyper at max height to the wooden platform, hold jump for a feel based amount of time (not min, not max) dash close to the transition to get enough height in next room any #1a #1a-6a ¶
docs.title: 1a 6a

docs.text: demohyper is faster and feels easier to space downright on the apostrophe don't buffer jump any #1a #1a-6b ¶
docs.title: 1a 6b

docs.text: hold jump + down + right through the transition release jump above the spring any #1a #1a-6c ¶
docs.title: 1a 6c

docs.text: hold jump after the wavedash any #1a #1a-2 ¶
docs.title: 1a 2

docs.text: if the timing of the updash feels off, there are 2 speeds you can get from the super aim for the fast speed always by drifting right a bit before the dash any #1a #1a-3b ¶
docs.title: 1a 3b

docs.text: pause for cutscene skip should be buffered buffer full climb jump (hold it) don't corner kick too early any #2a #2a-3 ¶
docs.title: 2a 3

docs.text: better to upright dash and fast fall than to right dash and climb jump any #2a #2a-9 ¶
docs.title: 2a 9

docs.text: hold jump during transition until high enough to demohyper ultra dont buffer jump any #2a #2a-1-2 ¶
docs.title: 2a 1 2

docs.text: crouch jump near the end before the super to get around the floating block on landing any #3a #3a-02-d ¶
docs.title: 3a 02 d

docs.text: on cutscene skip: demo right, pause unpause, buffer pause+jump (bubs drop) unpause, buffer a full climb jump, don't release big frame window for demo, make sure to drift left a couple frames before sending it any #3a #3a-04-d ¶
docs.title: 3a 04 d

docs.text: hold full jump for entry bhop any #3a #3a-08-a ¶
docs.title: 3a 08 a

docs.text: hold jump on entry, wait for peak to demo hyper any #3a #3a-10-c-1 ¶
docs.title: 3a 10 c 1

docs.text: hold down left before transition, release before transition ends don't touch directions until after the corner kick any #3a #3a-10-c-2 ¶
docs.title: 3a 10 c 2

docs.text: position on the far left for easier spacing for the hyper make sure to release right so you don't slide on the box on the way down buffer climb jump after right demo any #3a #3a-11-y ¶
docs.title: 3a 11 y

docs.text: ez strat is to just super into wave-upright dash any #3a #3a-12-b ¶
docs.title: 3a 12 b

docs.text: the key to this is to not greed the spacing, and not buffer the wallbounce any #3a #3a-13-x ¶
docs.title: 3a 13 x

docs.text: don't buffer the climbjump too early or you will faceplant get giga coyote on exit any #3a #3a-roof00 ¶
docs.title: 3a roof00

docs.text: exit with mid height to set up next room hyper bhop any #3a #3a-roof04 ¶
docs.title: 3a roof04

docs.text: land in the middle of the 3rd spring to be able to skip the 4th don't greed the climb jump and end up with a cb any #3a #3a-roof05 ¶
docs.title: 3a roof05

docs.text: don't rush the beginning or you'll be too fast, avoid corner boost make sure to get coyote on the ultra and hold down the entire time death cycle ¶ any #3a #3a-00-a ¶
docs.title: 3a 00 a

docs.text: after cutscene skip, enter with 2 buffered dashes into a short hyper release jump during transition alternate ¶ any #3a #3a-05-a ¶
docs.title: 3a 05 a

docs.text: hold jump just in case buffer hyper during upright demo to get dash back any #3a #3a-06-a ¶
docs.title: 3a 06 a

docs.text: transition cj super don't be crouching on entry to next room any #3a #3a-06-c ¶
docs.title: 3a 06 c

docs.text: don't crouch on entry hold left double jump buttons for first corner kick don't let go of left until after the final wall kick any #3a #3a-08-c ¶
docs.title: 3a 08 c

docs.text: dash as close to transition as possible for speed in next room any #3a #3a-s2 ¶
docs.title: 3a s2

docs.text: gultra or 2 demos to get through the transition sets up the cb any #3a #3a-s3 ¶
docs.title: 3a s3

docs.text: make sure to grab the block first, then hold right at the top of the block hit down and jump+dash buttons when you cross into the open background fast hyper bunny on exit any #4a #4a-d-02 ¶
docs.title: 4a d 02

docs.text: hold neutral out of the right bubble don't buffer any jumps from the ultras buffer downright out of the 2nd bubble, giga coyote on the 2nd wavedash downright dash very close to transition any #4a #4a-d-04 ¶
docs.title: 4a d 04

docs.text: delay jumping by a lot when you land from the transition any #4a #4a-d-05 ¶
docs.title: 4a d 05

docs.text: delay 2nd dash a bit or you'll undershoot any #4a #4a-d-06 ¶
docs.title: 4a d 06

docs.text: * entry: * demo in to last bubble of previous room * buffer downright jump and downright for gultra * jump just before transition * buffer down-right again to get in the bubble any #4a #4a-d-08 ¶
docs.title: 4a d 08

docs.text: don't reverse hyper too close to transition or you will be locked out of buffering the dash on the other side any #4a #4a-c-04 ¶
docs.title: 4a c 04

docs.text: buffer updash out of bubble, wait a few frames with neutral held, then steer right any #4a #4a-c-08 ¶
docs.title: 4a c 08

docs.text: 4a-b-08 (cpop) ¶ approach with wavedash, then hyper bhop into upright cb make the cb tiny (release right, don't hold jump) after hyper-bhop to get in the alcove: get lots of height on first wallkick (delay second wallkick) use corner boost button for the sub-pixel manip and the cpop old: wavedash into demohyper try to climb jump / corner boost to the main platform any #4a #4a-b-08 #cpop #blockless #chad #chultra ¶
docs.title: 4a-b-08 (cpop)

docs.text: approach with wavedash, then hyper bhop into upright cb make the cb tiny (release right, don't hold jump) after hyper-bhop to get in the alcove: get lots of height on first wallkick (delay second wallkick) use corner boost button for the sub-pixel manip and the cpop old: wavedash into demohyper try to climb jump / corner boost to the main platform
docs.title: 4a-b-08 (cpop)

docs.text: exit with hyper, not gultra any #4a #4a-a-00 ¶
docs.title: 4a a 00

docs.text: hold jump on bhop leading up to the tunnel buffer jump, let go of down demohyper almost instantly faceroll jump buttons for water boosts after granny cutscene skip: demohyper ultra, don't buffer jump, don't crouch any #4a #4a-a-01x ¶
docs.title: 4a a 01x

docs.text: buffer downright dash after transition delay jump from the ultra to line up the cp double tap jumps to jump + cp after the small delay any #4a #4a-a-02 ¶
docs.title: 4a a 02

docs.text: wait a bit for the cloud super for super speed and height exit with demohyper or extend the hyper from the crumble block and exit with a wave any #4a #4a-a-04 ¶
docs.title: 4a a 04

docs.text: extend the wavedash a lot delay the jump on the 1st platform by a couple frames to gain speed short demohyper exit, want almost no height let go of jump during transition old: any #4a #4a-a-05 ¶
docs.title: 4a a 05

docs.text: release jump before the transition to line up the cb hyper bhop out old: any #4a #4a-a-06 ¶
docs.title: 4a a 06

docs.text: delay jump on cloud super for enough height any #4a #4a-a-08 ¶
docs.title: 4a a 08

docs.text: dont buffer jump for wallbounce on transition, wait a frame or two any #4a #4a-a-09 ¶
docs.title: 4a a 09

docs.text: instant dash on transition instant bubble upright for the cb when you cover the hole in the C shaped bg any #5a-cassette #5a-cassette-a-12 ¶
docs.title: 5a cassette a 12

docs.text: eyes above the white line to have enough height for the cb bubs drop: https://youtu.be/Bo0zg3zi83E?t=332 any #5b #5b-b-01 ¶
docs.title: 5b b 01

docs.text: gotta be fast on entry with the demohyper and bubble the downright bubble skip has a visual cue: there is a line of writing on the wall, send the dash when madeline touches it any #5b #5b-b-03 ¶
docs.title: 5b b 03

docs.text: the neutral wall kicks with theo are important for consistency, and getting above the 2nd seeker properly any #5b #5b-d-01 ¶
docs.title: 5b d 01

docs.text: make sure you don't have jump pressed on transition buffer downright release theo when you are level with top of blue block any #5b #5b-d-05 ¶
docs.title: 5b d 05

docs.text: jump as you hit the switch with bubble to fall faster any #5b #5b-a-00 ¶
docs.title: 5b a 00

docs.text: on the right dashblock make sure you're not too low double climb jump on the final dashblock any #5b #5b-a-02 ¶
docs.title: 5b a 02

docs.text: hold jump after the wave before demo hypering any #6a #6a-04 ¶
docs.title: 6a 04

docs.text: make sure to grab the block fully by not pressing left early, not worth to greed it upright dash at the end to slow down any #6a #6a-05 ¶
docs.title: 6a 05

docs.text: don't ultra too early, wait until at least the flower any #6a #6a-10b ¶
docs.title: 6a 10b

docs.text: downright dash at the vertex of the 5-o-clock and 8-o-clock pointed crystals in the bg any #6a #6a-11 ¶
docs.title: 6a 11

docs.text: make sure to hit kevin high hold left reverse demo as you get to the blue part of kevin any #6a #6a-12b ¶
docs.title: 6a 12b

docs.text: cancel recoil by jumping after the dash to break the wall wicked (1/4 chance of failing due to subpixel rng) small demohyper to exit any #6a #6a-13 ¶
docs.title: 6a 13

docs.text: ultra kind of early so you avoid being too high to hold right but too low to downright feather boost any #6a #6a-20 ¶
docs.title: 6a 20

docs.text: 6a-00 (lake skip) ¶ 5 buffered dashes to get to the left wall 1 up, 4 left full climb jump when you grab the wall updash when you touch the 2nd wall of leafy bg wallkick on exit any #6a #6a-00 ¶
docs.title: 6a-00 (lake skip)

docs.text: 5 buffered dashes to get to the left wall 1 up, 4 left full climb jump when you grab the wall updash when you touch the 2nd wall of leafy bg wallkick on exit
docs.title: 6a-00 (lake skip)

docs.text: full hyper after the block starts moving if you go too early: as long as the block started moving you won't die any #6a #6a-boss-15 ¶
docs.title: 6a boss 15

docs.text: don't buffer the 2nd moving block hyper or you will faceplant any #6a #6a-boss-16 ¶
docs.title: 6a boss 16

docs.text: gotta buffer downright dash small hyper and small super asap any #6a #6a-boss-17 ¶
docs.title: 6a boss 17

docs.text: delay dash into feather to avoid laser hold down and right the entire time, release jump quickly on the small hyper at the end any #6a #6a-boss-19 ¶
docs.title: 6a boss 19

docs.text: delay dream jump for cb consistency any #7a #7a-c-03 ¶
docs.title: 7a c 03

docs.text: hold jump the entire time before the demo at max height or you won't land on the platform during midair super any #7a #7a-d-01 ¶
docs.title: 7a d 01

docs.text: left side of the window in the bg is a good cue to start the 2 updashes to the floating block tap left quickly once while fast falling any #7a #7a-d-03 ¶
docs.title: 7a d 03

docs.text: enter with a wavedash and buffer down right (gultra inputs) greed ultra for speed don't start final ultra on pillar approach too far left on the square block any #7a #7a-d-05 ¶
docs.title: 7a d 05

docs.text: 7a-e-06 (ass) ¶ climb up as high as possible before the first dash and you'll never come up short corner kick at the end is a normal dash any #7a #7a-e-06 #ass ¶
docs.title: 7a-e-06 (ass)

docs.text: climb up as high as possible before the first dash and you'll never come up short corner kick at the end is a normal dash
docs.title: 7a-e-06 (ass)

docs.text: buffer upright after max hyper to guarantee corner glide on exit any #7a #7a-f-02 ¶
docs.title: 7a f 02

docs.text: make sure not to buffer the jump to avoid disaster any #7a #7a-f-03 ¶
docs.title: 7a f 03

docs.text: * entry: buffer upright after max hyper to guarantee corner glide any #7a #7a-f-04 ¶
docs.title: 7a f 04

docs.text: important to tap left with the t-wallbounce any #7a #7a-f-07 ¶
docs.title: 7a f 07

docs.text: get max height on everything and send it any #7a #7a-flag04 ¶
docs.title: 7a flag04

docs.text: a quick leftdash after the first crystal is important for spacing the wallbounce any #7a #7a-flag09 ¶
docs.title: 7a flag09

docs.text: hit the 2nd dash crystal on the top left and buffer updash, then 1 quick climb jump + neutral wallkick any #7a #7a-flag12 ¶
docs.title: 7a flag12

docs.text: careful not to buffer the spike jump too early any #7a #7a-flag20 ¶
docs.title: 7a flag20

docs.text: - use the columns as cues - don't buffer upleft - i find upleft demo most consistent with this setup any #7a #7a-b-09 ¶
docs.title: 7a b 09

docs.text: get max height off the upright before going for midair super updash asap to give more space between you and the transition, allowing a buffered wavedash in the next screen any #7a #7a-a-00 ¶
docs.title: 7a a 00

docs.text: full hyper on transition, buffer upright to hit spring any #7a #7a-a-02 ¶
docs.title: 7a a 02

docs.text: small climbjump on the zipper before upleft demo arb #1a #1a-9b ¶ ![[1a-9b.2.arb.mp4]] drift to the left when landing with the berry for space to hyper bhop
docs.title: 1a 9b.arb

docs.text: ![[1a-9b.2.arb.mp4]] drift to the left when landing with the berry for space to hyper bhop
docs.title: arb #1a #1a-9b

docs.title: 1a 6.arb

docs.text: can wallbounce to save .1 if the downright after the block break is delayed slightly
docs.title: arb #1a #1a-6

docs.text: arb #1a #1a-8 ¶ ![[1a-8.3.arb.mp4]] collect berry on wooden platform
docs.title: 1a 8.arb

docs.text: pick up the 7z berry at the top here arb #1a #1a-8z ¶
docs.title: 1a 8z.arb

docs.text: start the left dash on the dark (right) half of the pillar in the bg impossible to start from too far right arb #1a #1a-s0 ¶
docs.title: 1a s0.arb

docs.text: for the ultra to the heart, try to land as far right as possible and stay crouched for the bhop get coyote on the lower platform to set up the cb, then insta downright arb #1a #1a-s1 ¶
docs.title: 1a s1.arb

docs.text: upright dash at the end of the yellow sign gotta jump before the updash arb #1a #1a-1 ¶
docs.title: 1a 1.arb

docs.text: super late corner kick reverse hyper, collect berry arb #1a #1a-3 ¶
docs.title: 1a 3.arb

docs.text: up-demo wallbounce far away from the wall to get berry easily up-demo makes sure you are not too low to land on top platform buffered wallbounce could cause miss berry if close to wall for the wallbounce, need to drift left slightly arb #1a #1a-3b ¶
docs.title: 1a 3b.arb

docs.text: arb #1a #1a-5 ¶ ![[1a-5.2.arb.mp4]] buffer downright dash to go straight to the zipper, downright and down again to guarantee stability jump on impact with the ice to stop recoil
docs.title: 1a 5.arb

docs.text: ![[1a-5.2.arb.mp4]] buffer downright dash to go straight to the zipper, downright and down again to guarantee stability jump on impact with the ice to stop recoil

docs.text: tap down once you start falling, demo to zipper option select: hold up and grab after the demo. if you land on top, proceed as normal, and on grabbing the zipper madeline will climb up in time to jump to the berry upleft to cb: send the dash as you are under the left side of the stone wall approaching the wooden platform arb #1a #1a-5a ¶

docs.text: - entry: delayed down-right dash, extend hyper to collect, then small hyper - hold right until you hit the right wall, then hold left until the up-left demo - do a right-cornerkick and continue holding right until exit - fastfall at cue 3 for a 4f window, otherwise window is 2f cue 1: down-right at the hole in the bg cue 2: short hyper between these 2 red rocks in bg or at the pointy bit in the ceiling cue 3 ^adbe67 alternate ¶ * cue: upright demo when under/passing the lowest tile on the 2nd drooping rocks arb #4a #4a-b-03 ¶

docs.text: underkevin: * entry cue: upright dash from the seam between grass and blue rocks * cue: after transition, start the down-right dash from directly under the save game logo * holding neutral until the dash seems to make things easier multiboost: * down-left into the kevin shortly after hitting the crystal but not immediately (around when you reach the leaves in bg) * start the neutral wall kick on the kevin very low arb #6b #6b-d-00 ¶
docs.title: 6b d 00.arb

docs.text: the hyper into the bumper has to be short and instant arb #6b #6b-d-02 ¶
docs.title: 6b d 02.arb

docs.text: ending: go for the fast heart strat, and react to getting good or bad bumper hit to transpose into the alternate strat - this is the frame you want to target for the updash. it's very risky to try to go for the first frame, so go for this cue or a frame or 2 after it - alternate ending if you get a bad bumper hit - release right as you approach the blue block at the end - get a fully extended hyper - alternate ending #2 - ending: demohyper or extended hyper with coyote to get as close to the pink barrier as possible arb #6b #6b-d-05 #heart ¶
docs.title: 6b d 05.arb

docs.text: cue: up-right from the tip of the crystal, the corner kick has to be really late and short to be able to right-dash into baddie the corner kick jump has to be super tight arb #6b #6b-c-01 ¶

docs.text: if the cj and first 2 jumps on the big ice platform are small, a full 3rd jump lines up the corner kick to make it easier start the up-right demo pretty early, or else you won't uncrouch in time arb #8a #8a-c-00 ¶

docs.text: buffer the wallbounce cue: line up vertically with the dash crystal on its right side, madeline's head should be slightly above it cue: start dash between rocky bg and the column can go as far as the right side of madeline in the middle of column arb #8a #8a-c-00b ¶

docs.text: neutral wall kick (hold jump some) sets up spacing for hyper bhop important: do demohyper bhop to avoid crouching, or else you risk missing the berry cue: down-right after clearing the step after the one the berry is above to avoid landing on the ground arb #8a #8a-c-03b ¶
